overall.description: A third-person perspective walkthrough of a rainy futuristic urban environment from Cyberpunk 2077. The character navigates wet city streets under massive elevated highways, crosses intersections with moderate traffic, explores a semi-enclosed construction site, and returns to covered sidewalks beneath the overpass.

events.description: group of pedestrians with umbrellas gathers at crosswalk waiting to cross
character steps off curb and begins crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along wet sidewalk toward intersection, approaching group of pedestrians with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians holding colorful umbrellas waiting at crosswalk

entered.detail: tall black pole with traffic signals and yellow cross sign
massive concrete overpass with metal framework spanning the street
large industrial building with distinctive skull and figure graffiti artwork
tall palm tree on sidewalk edge
yellow rectangular sign with black cross symbol

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy urban sidewalk with the character walking toward an intersection. A traffic light pole with a yellow cross sign stands on the left, while a massive elevated highway looms ahead. To the right, a large industrial building features prominent graffiti art. Pedestrians with umbrellas gather at the crosswalk as the character approaches and begins crossing the wet street.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection under elevated highway

events.description: multiple vehicles including silver sedan and black car pass through intersection
completes right turn to walk parallel to elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet asphalt intersection and turning right to follow the street beneath the overpass

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: wet asphalt crosswalk with white painted markings
tall modern street lamp with glowing orange light

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the open intersection, navigating around vehicles passing through. The elevated highway now spans directly overhead, casting the area in shadow. After crossing, the character turns right to walk along the street parallel to the highway structure, with the mural-covered building now visible on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk under elevated highway approaching construction site

events.description: approaching fenced construction area with scaffolding and industrial equipment
turns left to enter construction site through open gate

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk and turning left into a construction site entrance

notable_agents.action: person walking on opposite side of street under the overpass

entered.detail: black metal fence with gate entrance leading to construction yard
red metal scaffolding structure against industrial building
concrete industrial building with barred windows and metal panels

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive concrete pillars of the elevated highway, the character approaches a fenced construction area. The environment becomes more industrial with scaffolding and metal fencing. The character turns left through an open gate, entering the semi-enclosed construction site while the street and passing vehicles remain visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: semi-enclosed construction yard with debris and equipment

events.description: enters cluttered construction yard with red ambient lighting and scattered debris
navigates through debris and exits construction site back to sidewalk

agents.ego_description: moving through the cluttered construction site, passing containers and debris, then exiting back to the street

entered.detail: stacked plastic and metal containers with construction materials and pallets
scattered cardboard, wooden pallets, and construction debris on muddy ground
overgrown palm plants near fence line inside construction area
large machinery and work tables with tools and materials

segments.scene_description: Inside the construction site, the environment is cluttered with containers, debris, and industrial equipment. Red ambient lighting casts a glow on the concrete walls. The ground is muddy with scattered pallets and overgrown vegetation. The character navigates through the debris field toward the exit, passing large industrial machinery before emerging back onto the sidewalk.

events.description: exits construction site back to covered sidewalk under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk following other pedestrians with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians with red and white umbrellas walking ahead on sidewalk

entered.detail: wet concrete sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure
metal-paneled industrial building wall with barred windows

segments.scene_description: Back on the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, the character follows other pedestrians carrying umbrellas. The industrial wall runs along the left side while traffic moves on the street to the right. The environment remains sheltered from the rain under the massive concrete overpass structure as the walk continues through the futuristic urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rainy urban sidewalk into the shadowed depths of a massive highway overpass. It begins with the character walking toward a city intersection, passing a yellow traffic sign and a large industrial building adorned with graffiti. As the character enters the crosswalk, the camera moves through the wet street amidst pedestrians with umbrellas and passing vehicles. The scene then shifts as the character completes the crossing and turns right, moving from the open intersection into the heavy shadow cast by the elevated highway spanning overhead. Finally, the camera follows the character along the street parallel to the structure, leaving the mural-covered building behind.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rainy urban street into a cluttered industrial construction site and back out to a sheltered sidewalk. It begins beneath the massive concrete pillars of an elevated highway, moving toward a fenced area before turning left through an open gate. As the camera enters the semi-enclosed site, the environment shifts to a debris-filled field of containers and machinery illuminated by a red ambient glow. The scene then transitions from the muddy ground and industrial equipment back toward the city as the character emerges from the site. Finally, the camera follows a stream of pedestrians with umbrellas along a sidewalk, returning to the shelter of the concrete overpass while traffic flows beside the industrial walls.
